Senior Product Analyst — Growth & Retention
Loyalo (Vienna, Austria) — Hybrid (3 days in-office)

About Loyalo

Loyalo is a Series-B SaaS company building loyalty and retention infrastructure
for European consumer brands. Our platform processes ~5M end-customer events per
day across ~400 brand customers. We're a 90-person team headquartered in Vienna.

The role

We're hiring a Senior Product Analyst to own the analytics function for our
Retention product line. You'll partner with the Retention PM and the head of
CRM to shape the experimentation roadmap, build the segmentation models that
target our customers' end-users, and present findings monthly to our exec team.

Day-to-day:
- Design and analyze A/B tests on our customers' campaign workflows
- Build and maintain the segmentation pipeline (currently k-means + RFM)
- Own the weekly retention dashboard for the exec team
- Partner with data engineering to define the data contracts for the
  retention data warehouse
- Mentor one junior analyst (joining in Q3)

You will

- Have 3+ years of experience in product or growth analytics, ideally at a
  consumer-facing software company
- Be advanced in SQL — window functions, CTEs, query plan reading
- Be proficient in at least one of Python or R for analysis and basic ML
- Have shipped production segmentation or churn models, ideally with a
  measured business outcome
- Have run >20 A/B tests with proper statistical rigor (we use frequentist
  designs, sequential testing, and CUPED variance reduction)
- Be comfortable presenting findings to a non-technical exec audience
- Speak fluent English; German is a strong plus given our customer base

Bonus

- dbt experience (we have ~80 models)
- Experience with causal inference techniques beyond A/B (diff-in-diff,
  synthetic control)
- Experience deprecating legacy reporting systems / replacing
  hard-to-maintain spreadsheets with proper data infrastructure

Compensation

€65k–€80k base, depending on experience. Equity. Generous European-style
PTO (28 days minimum).
